_comment: geeek access list (local, server-side only — never served to browsers). Sign in with Apple is the only login. A person can sign in ONLY if their Apple ID email (or captured 'sub') is listed in 'allow' with approved:true. Add a new user by adding their Apple email here and re-deploying. To use Apple's private-relay or to pin an exact identity, add their 'sub' too.
